holdings.infoBox: WSML is an equity ETF with a total of 3551 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 2.79%, BLK CSH FND TREASURY SL AGENCY at 0.51%, nVent Electric at 0.25%, ATI Inc. at 0.25%, and Carpenter Technology at 0.24%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI World Small-Cap ETF (WSML) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI World Small Cap index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of small-cap companies across developed market countries globally. It seeks to provide total return. WSML was launched on Apr 1, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.
